items.title: Furikake
items.description: A particularly rich flavor blend common in Japan which adds a pleasant texture to a variety of foods. Sprinkle on rice, noodles, meat, fish, egg dishes, cheese, carpaccio, sashimi, shrimp or even vanilla ice cream. Ingredients: Sesame seeds, peanut, brown cane sugar (unrefined), rice vinegar, nori, worchester sauce, wasabi, Himalayan salt.
